snippet: <$TAG$1 v-model="${2:value}" label="${3:文本}" placeholder="${4:请输入文本}" />

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: 名称，提交表单的标识符

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: 是否为只读状态，只读状态下无法输入内容

attributes.name: colon
attributes.description: 是否在 label 后面添加冒号

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: 是否显示表单必填星号

attributes.name: clearable
attributes.description: 是否启用清除图标，点击清除图标后会清空输入框

attributes.name: is-link
attributes.description: 是否展示右侧箭头并开启点击反馈

attributes.name: show-word-limit
attributes.description: 是否显示字数统计，需要设置 maxlength 属性

attributes.name: error-message
attributes.description: 底部错误提示文案，为空时不展示

attributes.name: rules

events.description: 输入框获得焦点时触发

events.name: blur
events.description: 输入框失去焦点时触发

slots.name: input
slots.description: 自定义输入框，使用此插槽后，与输入框相关的属性和事件将失效

slots.description: 自定义输入框尾部按钮

slots.description: 自定义输入框最右侧的额外内容

<$TAG$1 @submit="onSubmit">
提交

attributes.name: min-minute

/>

snippet:
<$TAG$1 :index-list="${2:indexList}">
	<van-index-anchor index="A">标题 A</van-index-anchor>
	<van-cell title="文本" />
	<van-cell title="文本" />
</$TAG>

attributes.name: sticky
attributes.description: 是否开启锚点 sticky 悬浮

attributes.name: sticky-offset-top
attributes.description: 锚点 sticky 悬浮距离顶部的距离，单位 px

events.name: select
events.description: 点击索引栏的字符时触发

events.name: change
events.description: 当前高亮的索引字符变化时触发

slots.name: default
slots.description: 锚点位置显示内容，默认为索引字符

attributes.name: active-id
attributes.description: 左侧高亮选项的 id，支持 .sync 修饰符

attributes.name: main-active-index
attributes.description: 右侧高亮选项的索引，支持 .sync 修饰符

attributes.name: selected-icon
attributes.description: 自定义右侧选项选中状态的图标

events.name: click-item
events.description: 点击右侧选择项时触发

slots.name: content
slots.description: 自定义右侧区域内容，如果存在 items，则插入在顶部

attributes.name: description
attributes.description: 标题下方的辅助描述文字

attributes.name: close-on-click-overlay
attributes.description: 是否在点击遮罩层后关闭

attributes.name: safe-area-inset-bottom
attributes.description: 是否开启底部安全区适配

snippet:
<$TAG$1 v-model="${2:showPopover}" trigger="click" :actions="${3:actions}" @select="onSelect">
	<template #reference>
		<van-button type="primary">${4:点击弹出气泡}</van-button>
	</template>
</$TAG>

attributes.name: close-on-click-action
attributes.description: 是否在点击选项后关闭

attributes.name: close-on-click-outside
attributes.description: 是否在点击外部元素后关闭菜单

slots.name: reference
slots.description: 触发气泡弹出框的元素

snippet: <$TAG$1 :time="${2:time}" format="${3:DD 天 HH 时 mm 分 ss 秒}" @finish="${4:onFinish}" />

<$TAG$1 :active="${2:active}">
	<van-step>${3:买家下单}</van-step>
	<van-step>${4:商家接单}</van-step>
	<van-step>${5:买家提货}</van-step>
	<van-step>${6:交易完成}</van-step>
</$TAG>

events.name: click-step
events.description: 点击步骤的标题或图标时触发

slots.name: inactive-icon
slots.description: 自定义未激活状态图标

attributes.name: stroke-width
attributes.description: 进度条粗细，默认单位为 px

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: 圆环直径，默认单位为 px

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: 进度条颜色，传入对象格式可以定义渐变色
